## Weekly statistics
> **[UTC](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Utc) is the default time zone used for all time.**
>
> ratio=RP/666,666x50%+Tokens/400x10%+Tournamentsx20%+WECx20%
> - Tournaments: 1 for paricipated; 0 for missed;
> - WEC: (10 - 'days being inactive')/10
> 
> рЯОЦпЄП is awarded to member whose
> - Personal RP earning >= 1m
> - Token donations >= 460
>
> рЯТї is marked to **Prestige Cup** winner.
>
> рЯОБ is marked to member who stands on top 50,000 of **Showdown** event.
> 
> рЯЪЧ is marked to member who won prize car from **Showdown** event.
>
> вЪ†пЄП is marked to the following situations
> - Personal рЯУШtoken donations < 150 (1st half season), < 300 (full season) and Personal RP earning < 667k (full season)
> - Personal рЯУШRP earning < 333k (full season), = indicates no change of RP, вЙИ/~ is marked to change of RP < 1.6k
> - Absense from рЯФґ**Weekly Elite Cup** (change of RP < 1.6k). (**Attending WEC is required**)
> - Absense from рЯПЖ**Tournaments**.
